name: Cheese It!

abilities.name: Aim for My Smoke!
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Charge action, it may make a Piano marker within 1".

abilities.name: Daring Escape
abilities.text: During the fourth turn of the game, while more than 4" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

abilities.name: Walk the Plank
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action that targeted this model, this model may drain a (t). If it does so, move the attacker up to 4". Then, this model gains a Hastened token.

extraction_notes: Piano marker details not provided on card beyond its creation
Hastened token details not provided on card
Faction inferred from keyword 'Bayou' (Infamous is a Bayou keyword)
